<!--
PR title: use a concise, imperative summary, e.g. "Restructure architecture docs and add ADR 0000".
Keep this PR focused — one logical change set. Split unrelated work into separate PRs.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences: what this PR does and why it matters. Lead with the outcome. -->

## Motivation & context

<!-- The problem being solved or the decision being recorded. Link the driving issue/discussion. -->

## Changes

<!-- Bullet the notable changes. Group by area (docs, schema, api, cli, infra...). -->
-

## Type of change

<!-- Keep all that apply. -->
- [ ] Bug
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Improvement

## Related issues

<!-- Use closing keywords so merge auto-closes them, e.g. "Closes #12". List phase/sub-issues touched. -->
- Closes #

## Verification

<!-- How you confirmed this is correct. For docs: links render, diagrams display, ADR status set.
     For code: commands run + results, tests added/passing, manual steps. -->
-

## Decision records

<!-- New or amended ADRs in docs/decisions/, with their status (Proposed / Accepted / Superseded). N/A if none. -->
-
